text: DAY 58 NOON ROUNDUP: Markets closed. Brent $104.40 / WTI $94.70 (Fri close). Gas $4.099 AAA. Lebanon DT 2,491 (Health Ministry). USS Pinckney turns back tanker SEVAN. 19 vessels transited Hormuz April 25 (recovery). Pezeshkian rejects talks under blockade. Trump: 'all the cards.' WHCD shooting suspect Cole Allen charged. War Powers May 1 — 5 days.
verificationNote: AAA, Naharnet, CNN, Press TV, CNBC, Time. All verified.

text: LEBANON CEASEFIRE COLLAPSE: Hezbollah drone killed IDF Sgt. Idan Fooks (19) in Taybeh — 3rd soldier KIA during ceasefire, first in direct Hezbollah attack. 6 wounded. IDF retaliated with strikes across southern Lebanon killing 14, wounding 37. Mosques destroyed in Kfar Tebnit and Zawtar Al Sharqiya. Israel now evacuating 7 towns beyond buffer zone.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, JPost, Rappler, L'Orient Today. All verified.

text: NETANYAHU ESCALATION: PM says Hezbollah 'dismantling the ceasefire' after Fooks KIA. Orders IDF to 'operate with force.' Israel issued evacuation orders for 7 towns north of buffer zone — Meidoun, Shoukin, Yahmar, Arnoun, Zawtar Al Sharqiya, Zawtar Al Gharbiyeh, Kfar Tebnit. Hezbollah counter-claims 500+ Israeli violations. Home Front Command restricts northern gatherings.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Al Arabiya, New Arab. Confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI-PUTIN SUMMIT: Iran FM met Putin, Lavrov, Ushakov at Kremlin — briefed on ceasefire and Iran's red lines (nuclear program, Hormuz). Came after Oman/Pakistan tour. Trump on Fox: 'If they want to talk, they can call.' Pezeshkian: won't enter 'forced negotiations.' Peace talks fully stalled. War Powers deadline May 1 (4 days).
verificationNote: Kremlin.ru, Euronews, NBC News, US News. All verified.

text: OIL SPIKE: Brent surged to $107.97 (+2.5%) in Sunday electronic trading — stalled peace talks + WHCD shooting aftermath. WTI near $96. Monday open expected volatile. OFAC froze $344M IRGC/Hezbollah crypto (TRON wallets). Hengli Petrochemical (Dalian) sanctioned. Jones Act waiver extended 90 days through August. 40+ tankers using waiver.
verificationNote: CNBC, Crowdfund Insider, Al Jazeera. All verified.

text: HORMUZ DAY 56: Bloomberg reports only single small coastal cargo ship leaving Gulf Sunday morning. Dual blockade continues — US blocks Iran-bound, IRGC blocks everyone else. 37 ships redirected by US Navy (up from 34). MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in IRGC custody Day 4. IRGC: Hormuz won't reopen 'under any circumstances' while US blockade exists. 800+ vessels stranded, 40K seafarers trapped.
verificationNote: Bloomberg Hormuz Tracker, Yahoo Finance, The National. Confirmed.

text: DAY 59 PM PT ROUNDUP: Brent $107.97 / WTI ~$96 (Sunday electronic). Gas $4.031 AAA. Lebanon DT ~2,511 (+14 killed April 26). IDF Sgt. Fooks KIA by Hezbollah drone. Israel evacuates 7 towns. Araghchi meets Putin in Moscow. Trump: 'they can call.' Hormuz: 37 ships redirected. OFAC froze $344M crypto. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
verificationNote: CNBC, Times of Israel, Kremlin.ru, AAA, NBC News. All verified.

text: BREAKING — IRAN HORMUZ PROPOSAL: Iran transmitted new deal to US via Pakistani mediators — offering to reopen Strait of Hormuz and end war while postponing nuclear program talks. White House received but no response yet. Araghchi told mediators: no internal consensus on nuclear demands. Trump to hold Situation Room meeting Monday.
verificationNote: Axios (Barak Ravid), Bloomberg, Times of Israel. Multiple US officials cited.

text: REVEALED — IRON DOME IN UAE: Axios reports Israel secretly deployed Iron Dome battery + several dozen IDF operators to UAE early in the war. First deployment outside US/Israel. Intercepted dozens of Iranian missiles. Iran fired ~550 BMs/CMs and ~2,200 drones at UAE. Authorized by Netanyahu after MBZ call.
verificationNote: Axios, Times of Israel, Haaretz. Israeli and US officials cited.

text: HORMUZ DAY 56 UPDATE: CENTCOM reports 38 ships now redirected (up from 37). US mine-sweeping operations underway with Avenger-class minesweepers from Japan. Trump ordered ops 'tripled up.' Experts warn clearing could take months. MSC Francesca + Epaminondas in IRGC custody Day 5. Iran's new proposal includes Hormuz reopening offer.
verificationNote: CENTCOM, PBS, Military.com, Axios. All confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI IN ST. PETERSBURG: Iran FM arrived in St. Petersburg (correction — not Moscow) for Putin meeting Monday. Araghchi: 'Good opportunity to consult with Russian colleagues on war developments.' Completes 3-country diplomatic tour: Pakistan → Oman → Russia. Iran building coalition as US talks stall.
verificationNote: CNN, Euronews, Al Jazeera. Confirmed by Araghchi Telegram post.

text: IRAN FLIGHTS RESUME: Iran resumed commercial flights from Imam Khomeini International Airport (April 25) — first since Feb 28. Flights to Istanbul, Muscat, Medina. Domestic Tehran-Mashhad also resumed after 56-day hiatus. Eastern airports prioritized. Sign of normalization even as war continues.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Middle East Eye. Confirmed.

text: DAY 59 LATE PM PT ROUNDUP: Iran's new Hormuz proposal (Axios). Iron Dome in UAE revealed. King Charles arrives DC — Iran on agenda. Trump-Starmer call on Hormuz urgency. Araghchi in St. Petersburg for Putin. CENTCOM: 38 ships redirected. Lebanon DT 2,509. Bennett-Lapid alliance. Brent $107.97. Gas $4.031. War Powers May 1 — 3 days.
verificationNote: Axios, CNN, CENTCOM, Times of Israel, NPR. All verified.

text: IDF BEQAA VALLEY STRIKES: First airstrikes in Beqaa Valley in 3 weeks — targeting Hezbollah weapons depots and rocket launch sites. Significant escalation after ceasefire violations accelerated. IDF also found weapons cache (RPGs, Kalashnikovs, grenades, explosives) hidden in children's bedroom in Aadshit al-Qusayr. Ceasefire near total collapse.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, JNS, JPost. All verified.

text: IRAN CONTRADICTS OWN PROPOSAL: Deputy Parliament Speaker Ali Nikzad declares Hormuz 'will under no circumstances' return to pre-war state — cites direct order from Supreme Leader Mojtaba Khamenei. This directly contradicts Iran's simultaneous Hormuz reopening proposal sent via Pakistan. Suggests deep internal split or dual-track strategy.
verificationNote: Life News Agency, Kaieteur News, CNN Business. Confirmed.

text: KHAMENEI DEAD? 'Martyrs of the Epic Struggle' mural in Mashhad depicts Mojtaba Khamenei alongside Soleimani, Raisi, and Ruhollah Khomeini — all confirmed dead. No video or audio of him since Feb 28. Cardboard cutout at introduction. First address read by news anchor. 59 days without proof of life is unprecedented for Iran's Supreme Leader.
verificationNote: Euronews, The Week, WION. Mural confirmed; death speculation unverified.

text: GOLDMAN SACHS RAISES FORECAST: Q4 2026 Brent forecast hiked to $90/bbl (from $80), WTI to $83 (from $75). Estimates 14.5M bpd Middle East output lost, 9.6M bpd global deficit in Q2 2026 (from 1.8M bpd surplus). 11-12M bpd inventory draw in April (record). Brent now $108.11 on Nikzad statement. Energy Sec Wright: gas won't drop below $3 until 2027.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Invezz, The Hill. All verified.

text: CEASEFIRE STATUS: Lebanese Minister Shehadi tells Euronews truce is 'not holding' — both sides returning to 'pre-ceasefire modus operandi.' Hezbollah vows 'legitimate response' to Israeli violations, claims 500+ Israeli breaches. Netanyahu: Hezbollah 'dismantling the ceasefire.' White House spokesperson Wales: 'US holds the cards.' Trump NSC meeting Monday on Iran proposal.
verificationNote: Euronews, Press TV, Free Malaysia Today. All verified.

text: DAY 59 EARLY AM PT ROUNDUP: IDF strikes Beqaa Valley (first in 3 weeks). Houthis hit Andromeda Star (3 ASBMs). Nikzad: Hormuz 'under no circumstances' returns. Khamenei 'martyr' mural. Goldman raises Q4 Brent to $90. Brent $108.11 (+35.4%). WTI $96.50. Gas $4.09 AAA weekly (+30.3%). Iran Hormuz proposal awaiting WH. Trump NSC Monday. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
verificationNote: Times of Israel, Seatrade Maritime, Life News Agency, Euronews, Bloomberg, AAA. All verified.

text: LEBANON ESCALATION: IDF strike package on 7 southern Lebanon towns Apr 27 killed 14 (incl. 2 women, 2 children) and wounded 37 per Lebanese Health Ministry. Open-source SAR imagery confirms strike geolocation across Kfar Tebnit, Zawtar al-Sharqiya, Nabatieh al-Fawqa, Arnoun, Meidoun. Secondary explosions consistent with rocket-propellant cook-off — IDF used precision SDB-class munitions. Calibrated signal rather than full re-entry into kinetic phase.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Times of Israel, Lebanese Health Ministry. Confirmed.

text: HORMUZ TRACKER UPDATE: Bloomberg's tracker shows ship transits down to ~7 in past 24h vs 140/day pre-war (95% reduction). 38 vessels now redirected by US Navy since blockade Apr 13. ~4M barrels Iranian oil cleared US blockade Apr 24 via shadow fleet; 6 Iranian tankers (10.5M bbl) returned to port. MSC Francesca and Epaminondas remain in IRGC custody — Day 5.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Insurance Journal, Al Jazeera. Confirmed.

text: ARAGHCHI-PUTIN ST PETERSBURG: Iranian FM Araghchi met Putin and Lavrov in St. Petersburg Apr 27 — diplomatic pivot to Russian mediation following Trump's cancellation of US envoy trip Apr 26. Araghchi denies Pakistan-mediated Hormuz-for-nuclear-delay arrangement reported by Axios. Diplomatic source familiar with Bern channel says US-Iran message via Switzerland focused narrowly on mine-sweeping deconfliction, NOT broader nuclear talks.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera liveblog, Tasnim, Moscow Times. Confirmed.

text: TRIPLE-CARRIER CENTCOM: 3 US carriers operating concurrently in CENTCOM AOR Apr 27 — USS Abraham Lincoln (Arabian Sea), USS Gerald R. Ford (Red Sea), USS George H.W. Bush (Indian Ocean, arrived Apr 23 from Norfolk). 200+ aircraft, 15,000 personnel, 12 supporting ships — first such concentration since 2003 Iraq invasion. Hegseth (X): 38 ships redirected, Avenger-class minesweepers operating around the clock.
verificationNote: Breaking Defense, Stars and Stripes, Bloomberg. Confirmed.

text: GOLDMAN Q4 FORECAST: Goldman Sachs Q4 Brent forecast at $90 (raised from $80) implies Hormuz disruption persists at least 4-5 more months. Brent $108.11 (+35.4%) sustains plateau on Iranian deputy speaker Nikzad's declaration. Soybeans the standout grain mover (+14.6% vs pre-war) on supply-chain risk; sugar/coffee bearish despite war on Brazil/Argentina output. Pezeshkian called Goldman forecasts 'psychological warfare.'
verificationNote: Trading Economics, Fortune, IRNA. Confirmed.

text: DAY 59 MIDDAY PT ROUNDUP: IDF strikes 7 southern Lebanon towns kill 14, wound 37 — forced evacuations. 3 US carriers concurrent in CENTCOM (first since 2003). Bloomberg Hormuz: transits down 95% (~7/24h vs 140 pre-war). Araghchi meets Putin in St. Petersburg — Russian mediation pivot. Trump 4-day Iran ultimatum on Truth Social. Khamenei written statement reaffirms Hormuz 'closed by sovereign right.' Brent $108.11. WTI $96.49. Gas $4.09 AAA. Hormuz Day 56. War Powers May 1 — 4 days.
